Figure 3: Skill category distribution across methods. Our skills cover all ten functional categories with a balanced distribution, whereas S
You have access to a library of Skills -- pre-defined step-by-step workflow guides for common tasks on web pages.
### When to Use Skills: - When an available skill matches your current sub-goal - Skills save you from figuring out the UI workflow
Figure 4: Failure analysis of W EB XS KILL (grounded mode) on WebArena. (a) Failure categories for failed tasks from trajectory inspection.
Zora Zhiruo Wang, Jiayuan Mao, Daniel Fried, and Graham Neubig. Agent workflow memory. arXiv preprint arXiv:2409.07429 , 2024.
